extensionDescription.message: Professional Arabic typography correction for every website. Fixes letter-spacing, injects beautiful Arabic fonts, and corrects rendering issues that cause disjointed Arabic text.

masterToggleAriaLabel.message: Enable or disable Arabic Type extension

letterSpacingNote.message: Letter spacing is always set to 0 to prevent Arabic letter disconnection. This is the most common cause of broken Arabic rendering on the web.

forceRTLDescription.message: Forces right-to-left direction on Arabic text blocks. Enable for sites where Arabic appears left-to-right incorrectly.

diacriticsDescription.message: Improves rendering of Arabic vowel marks (tashkeel) to prevent clipping above and below the text line.

siteFontOverrideLabel.message: Use different font on this site

siteFontOverrideDescription.message: Choose a different font for this site only, overriding your global font selection.

fontSourceNote.message: Fonts served by Google Fonts. Requires internet connection for initial load.

fontPrivacyNote.message: Font requests are sent to Google's servers. See fonts.google.com/privacy.

statusGlobalMode.message: Using global mode — lang/dir attributes found.

statusNoArabic.message: No Arabic text detected on this page.
